name: Artifacts Baselined
description: All life-cycle data configuration items are identified and placed under configuration management (baselined).
rationale: DO-178C Table A-8: configuration items are identified, baselines established, and the integrity of the configuration is maintained throughout the life cycle.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
